title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If they achieve Gold, they gain XP &a
content:
✔ If they achieve Gold, they gain XP & an additional “Key” to unlock final submission privileges.

✅ Why This Works:
• Ensures students take peer review seriously.
• Gamifies the process while reinforcing essential feedback skills.
• Prevents low-effort, surface-level responses.

📜 6. Course Reflection Thread – Renamed & Themed

✔ Renamed: “The Archivist’s Codex: Reflecting on the Journey”
✔ Micro-Title Changes Weekly to Align with Course Themes.
✔ Students provide a self-assessment of what they’ve learned & experienced that week.

✅ Why This Works:
• Ties into the RPG framework by making reflections feel like recorded lore.
• Encourages self-awareness and academic metacognition.

📌 Version 4.6: Final Questions Before Lock-In
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 57 (chunk 57/555)
